createDirectGroup(string,address,address.details: Direct mode has no deposits - settlements pull via transferFrom.

returns.group: Address of the newly created GroupDirect contract

createEscrowGroup(string,address,address.details: Validates inputs before deployment.      Caller should be included in members array.      Default deadline: 48 hours from now if not specified.

params._depositDeadline: Unix timestamp - group cancels if not all deposited by then
params._members: Array of member addresses (must include caller)
params._token: ERC20 token address for deposits and settlements

returns.group: Address of the newly created GroupEscrow contract

getAllGroups().details: Use with caution for large deployments - may run out of gas.

returns._0: The group's settlement mode (Direct or Escrow)

params.limit: Maximum number of groups to return

allGroups(uint256).notice: Array of all created group addresses

getGroupCount().notice: Get total number of groups created.

getGroupMode(address).notice: Get the mode of a group.

getGroupsByUser(address).notice: Get all groups a user is a member of.

getGroupsPaginated(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a paginated list of groups.

groupModes(address).notice: Mapping from group address to its mode

userGroups(address,uint256).notice: Mapping from user address to their group addresses
